reboot.note: Reboot/select/plan retroactively confirmed: 378/378 green at start, pkg_hash s6-b8d21f matched. Plan: trackMechanics(coverageMatrix, knowledgeState, profile) in MechanicTracker.ts + updateKnowledge(knowledgeState, record, profile) in KnowledgeModel.ts.

select.note: Anchor: zero-assumption read of DesignSpace.ts's CoverageMatrix/cellKey before use. Found LevelRecord needed mechanicsExercised (no field named a level's mechanics) and masteryRoutingConfidenceThreshold needed a concrete, buildable definition (archetype-identity approach was unbuildable -- LevelRecord carries only one ArchetypeRun). Ledgered as dm-0050 BEFORE implementation.

plan.note: Implemented MechanicTracker.ts (trackMechanics + topTierRatio) and KnowledgeModel.ts (updateKnowledge, pure EMA). Widened CampaignState.mechanicsIntroduced/mechanicsMastered to ReadonlySet<EntityKind>; added CampaignProfile.mastery.knowledgeLearningRate. No TODOs/stubs.

anchor.note: npm test: 392/392 green (378 baseline + 14 new: 2 CampaignProfile rejection tests for knowledgeLearningRate, 12 MechanicTracker/KnowledgeModel tests incl. two-profile externalization proofs). npx tsc --noEmit clean. npm run build clean.

implement.note: npm test: 392/392 green (378 baseline + 14 new: 2 CampaignProfile rejection tests for knowledgeLearningRate, 12 MechanicTracker/KnowledgeModel tests incl. two-profile externalization proofs). npx tsc --noEmit clean. npm run build clean.

verify.note: PKG: +2 nodes (eval/campaign/mechanic_tracker, eval/campaign/knowledge_model), dependency addition on eval/campaign/campaign_state and eval/campaign/campaign_profile (components/behavior for EntityKind), edges both directions. pkg_hash s6-b8d21f -> s6-c4a9e7.

integrate.note: task_slices.md S6.3 -> COMPLETED. No requirements_backlog.md state change needed this slice -- REQ-031/041 were already IN_PROGRESS from S6.1/P5 respectively; they flip VERIFIED at S6.6.

report.note: Handoff written: pkg_hash s6-c4a9e7, next focus S6.4 ChapterHealth, open question about a trend-threshold profile field flagged.

acceptance.criterion: S6.3 delivers the mechanicsIntroduced/mechanicsMastered share of REQ-031's ten macro variables plus the knowledgeState update path (KnowledgeModel). trackMechanics + updateKnowledge are pure and tested against real CoverageMatrix fixtures. REQ-031 stays IN_PROGRESS -- the remaining macro variables (behaviorState done at S6.2; skillCurve, optimizationDepth, curiosityTrend, chapterHealth, retentionPrediction) land at S6.4/S6.5.

S6.3 delivers the P6 share of REQ-041: Campaign Intelligence consumes the coverage matrix BY REFERENCE (dm-0045) to determine mechanic introduction/mastery, never recomputing it. REQ-041 stays IN_PROGRESS in the backlog until S6.6 (P5's share already VERIFIED at P5 close; P6's share now COMPLETED).
